sections.label: Intro
lines: Sing loud, O earth, let joy arise,
A song of hope to pierce the skies.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Praise the Lord, all nations, unite,
Let hearts and voices take their flight.
For steadfast love spans age to age,
Through storms, His faith will never fade.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: A love unshaken, firm and true,
In every heart, it renews.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Let all the nations sing and shout,
His truth endures, it won’t run out.
His mercy flows, forever reigns,
The Lord of all, His love remains.

sections.label: Post-Chorus
lines: Forever faithful, forever true,
His love is here, for me, for you.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Through every trial, joy will bloom,
His promises light every room.
A grace that lifts, a peace that saves,
All bound by love, beyond the grave.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Lift your hands, let the heavens hear,
A song of faith to quell all fear.
Boundless love, it fills the skies,
Forever faithful, never dies.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Let all the nations sing and shout,
His truth endures, it won’t run out.
His mercy flows, forever reigns,
The Lord of all, His love remains.

sections.label: Outro
lines: Sing loud, O earth, let joy arise,
A song of hope to pierce the skies.
Forever faithful, forever true,
His love is here, for me, for you.
